name: exportparquet
description: Export aggregated parquet data to a single parquet file per device with column selection and optional renaming
output_format: One parquet file per source device: `<source>.parquet`

aggregation.description: Aggregation window to select for export (must match a window produced by aggregate)

columns.description: Column selection and renaming: map source column name to output name. Empty = export all columns as-is.
